---
name: Research note
about: Propose a narrowly scoped evidence-backed correction or follow-up
title: "[research] "
labels: research
assignees: ""
---

## Claim or Correction

State the proposed correction or follow-up.

## Witness / Scope

List the affected witness, trace, tool, or doc.

## Evidence

Include only the strongest concrete evidence.

## Confidence

- low
- medium
- high

## Promotion Standard

Explain what must be true before this belongs in promoted public docs.
